   "reasoning": "I've seen it all before, but this time it feels like the system is on the brink of collapse. I've got 52 kids in my class, and I'm barely keeping my head above water. We need more staff, not more paperwork, so I'm prioritizing staff hiring and teacher incentives. Those are the only things that will actually reduce my load and let me focus on the kids who need me most, like Juan and Maria who are struggling to keep up.",
